title: Dev n' Friends
body:
# **Dev n' Friends!**
A small modpack for Developers & Friends containing [**Cobblemon**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) & other Quality of Life mods!
## What does Dev n' Friends contain?
The Dev n' Friends modpack contains [**Cobblemon**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) as the main mod, though [**Cobblemon**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) may be the main focus of this modpack it sure does have more than just that! Dev n' Friends has mods such as, [**Handcrafted**](https://modrinth.com/mod/handcrafted), [**NiftyCarts**](https://modrinth.com/mod/niftycarts), and [**Supplementaries**](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries), this modpack has many mods for Building, as well as Aesthetically pleasing mods.

Some mods on on top of what was listed above that Dev n' Friends has is [**Artifacts**](https://modrinth.com/mod/artifacts), [**Carry On**](https://modrinth.com/mod/carry-on), [**Distant Horizons**](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons), and [**Figura**](https://modrinth.com/mod/figura). A lot of the mods in this pack we're added because the community at Dev n' Friends wanted them, so this modpack may not be tailored for everyone but it sure was built for everyone in the Dev n' Friends community.

## Why should you play Dev n' Friends?
Well, like said previously this modpack has mods for **Building**, and some mods that can be _Aesthetically pleasing_ to everyone, more mods Dev n' Friends has are the **Building** mods like [**Handcrafted**](https://modrinth.com/mod/handcrafted), [**Another Furniture**](https://modrinth.com/mod/another-furniture), and the Utility mods like [**NiftyCarts**](https://modrinth.com/mod/niftycarts).

**Quick note to anyone who reads this.**
> Please do **NOT** message anyone asking to join this server, as said server is **_invite only_** and **_whitelisted_**.
